questions: What type of animal caused the bite?
Is the animal healthy and available for 10-day observation? (Yes/No)
Did the animal develop clinical signs of rabies during observation? (Yes/No)
Is the animal known to be rabid or suspected rabid? (Yes/No)
Is the patient non-immunized against rabies? (Yes/No)
Is the patient previously immunized against rabies? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have a history of hypersensitivity? (Yes/No)
Is the patient taking corticosteroids, antimalarials, or other immunosuppressives? (Yes/No)
